<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be deadly. I need to avoid that and change direction. The safest next move is to turn down so I can look for an open path below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

To move toward the open area and eventually the goal at row 08 column H, I should rotate clockwise to face down, where the path below is blocked by lava, so I need to steer away from that next; but the immediate safe adjustment is to turn clockwise now.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
